sources.title: Databricks AI Dev Kit
sources.description: Databricks Toolkit for AI Coding Agents — MCP server, skills, and core library for building on Databricks with Claude Code, Cursor, etc.

sources.title: Claude Code Skills — Official Documentation
sources.description: Complete guide to creating, managing, and sharing skills to extend Claude Code capabilities.

sources.title: 7 Insane OpenClaw Use Cases (AntiGravity)
sources.description: Video by Jack Roberts showcasing creative applications of OpenClaw technology.

sources.title: MCP Official Specification
sources.description: The authoritative Model Context Protocol specification — architecture, primitives, transports, security.

sources.title: Build an MCP Server — Official Tutorial
sources.description: Step-by-step tutorial to build MCP servers in Python (FastMCP) and TypeScript.

sources.title: MCP Official Reference Servers
sources.description: Official collection of Model Context Protocol servers — filesystem, git, memory, fetch, and more.

sources.title: MCP TypeScript SDK
sources.description: Official TypeScript SDK for building MCP servers and clients.

sources.title: MCP Python SDK (FastMCP)
sources.description: Official Python SDK with FastMCP — auto-generate tool definitions from type hints.

sources.title: GitHub Official MCP Server
sources.description: GitHub's official MCP Server for AI-powered GitHub operations.

sources.title: OpenClaw — Open Source Personal AI Agent
sources.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any platform. 248K+ stars. Caused the Mac Mini shortage.

sources.title: Oh My OpenCode — Multi-Model AI Agent Orchestrator
sources.description: Open-source Claude Code alternative with multi-model support, parallel agents, and deterministic refactoring.

sources.title: DeepSeek — Open-Source AI Models from China
sources.description: DeepSeek-V3 (671B MoE) and R1 (reasoning). Trained for $6M, rivals GPT-4. Open-weight, MIT licensed.

sources.title: Ollama — Run LLMs Locally
sources.description: Docker for AI models. Run DeepSeek, Llama, Qwen, Mistral locally with one command. 163K+ stars.

sources.title: Hugging Face Transformers — The AI Model Hub
sources.description: 500K+ models. The GitHub of AI. ggml.ai joined HF in 2026 to secure local AI's future.

sources.title: LangChain & LangGraph — Agent Engineering Platform
sources.description: Build AI agents and RAG pipelines. LangGraph for stateful agent graphs. 128K+ stars.

sources.title: CrewAI — Multi-Agent Orchestration Framework
sources.description: Build teams of role-playing AI agents. Crews + Flows architecture. 45K+ stars.

sources.title: Mac Mini M4 as AI Server — The Local Inference Revolution
sources.description: How OpenClaw caused a Mac Mini shortage. Configs, benchmarks, and setup guide for local AI.

sources.title: Open Source LLMs in 2026 — Complete Landscape
sources.description: DeepSeek, Llama 4, Qwen 2.5, Mistral, Gemma 3, GLM5 — every major open model compared.
